headline: CDW to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6
summary: VERNON HILLS, Ill., April 22, 2026--CDW Corporation (Nasdaq: CDW) announced today that it will host a webcast conference call to discuss its first quarter 2026 results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. CT/8:30 a.m. ET.
